dateline: Johnson Space Center, Houston / Kennedy Space Center — 2017–Present
heroHeadline: NASA Science Leadership Publicly Defends Artemis II Architecture Against Congressional and Public Critics
heroSubtitle: Apr 14: NASA science leadership pushes back against mounting skepticism about the Artemis II crewed lunar flyby's scope and cost, framing the mission as essential human-rating validation ahead of Artemis III. Orion heat shield inspection continues at KSC.
footerNote: Data sourced from NASA.gov, OIG Reports, SpaceNews, Ars Technica, Congressional appropriations. Tier 1: NASA/ESA/Official. Tier 2: SpaceNews/Ars Technica/Reuters. Tier 3: Planetary Society/AIAA.
